# AI-assisted contribution guidance

Use this file with `AGENTS.md` and `README.md` when implementing changes.

## Workflow alignment
- Read `AGENTS.md` first for repository-wide rules.
- Use `README.md` for setup/runbook and operational checks.
- Use `.github/instructions/frontend.instructions.md` for UI work.
- Use `.github/instructions/backend.instructions.md` for backend/API work.
- Use `.github/pull_request_template.md` when preparing PR output.

## Expectations
- Propose a plan before edits.
- Keep edits scoped and minimize unrelated churn.
- Include tests/checks proportional to risk.
- Update docs whenever behavior or process changes.
